purpose: Gap inventory between IDM legacy de.cocondo.app.system and Springmaster de.cocondo.system after payload profile cleanup.

inputs.idmObservedState: idm.zip after Springmaster compatibility/core transfer incident; target already contains 000010 and 000011 Springmaster-generated patches

decisions.generatedTargetArtifacts: temporary build/platform-update workspace excluded from regular exports

already-in-springmaster-core.nextAction: Keep in Springmaster and IDM imported core; migrate IDM imports before deleting legacy copies.

core-dto-list-metadata-contracts.nextAction: Available in Springmaster Core. Migrate IDM imports only through a separate reviewed target-project patch.

core-id-implementation.nextAction: Available in Springmaster Core. Migrate IDM imports only through a separate reviewed target-project patch.

core-entity-service-and-sequence.nextAction: Do not migrate as one slice. First implement DomainEntityService and TagService support; defer KeyValuePair metadata persistence and NumberSequence to separate architecture slices.

core-web-http-error-foundation.nextAction: Requires web/config/error-contract slice and target property compatibility review.

core-event-and-audit-foundation.nextAction: Requires event persistence/logging policy and serializer dependency decision.

core-application-info.nextAction: Requires endpoint/path convention and public/protected API policy.

core-security-jwt-authorization.nextAction: Requires separate security architecture slice; preserve IDM domain adapter outside Core.

core-swagger-openapi.nextAction: Treat as optional web tooling/profile slice; avoid binding Core runtime to Swagger unless explicitly desired.

records.notes: Ported without Lombok and without de.cocondo.app imports; package moved to entity.service.
Ported as collection-based tag helper; no KeyValuePair persistence introduced.

deletionGate: All common Core candidates required by IDM are present under src/main/java/de/cocondo/system/** in Springmaster.
IDM imports are migrated from de.cocondo.app.system.* to de.cocondo.system.* or explicitly classified as IDM-domain adapters.
No production/test source outside allowed legacy documentation imports de.cocondo.app.system.*.
IDM mvn test succeeds after migration.
IDM exports a clean Full-ZIP baseline after migration.
PROJECT_DOCS/CORE/** in IDM is reduced to target-specific imported-core documentation.

implementationHistory.summary: Classified core-entity-service-and-sequence into safe service support, deferred metadata persistence model and separate NumberSequence foundation.
Implemented DomainEntityService and TagService under de.cocondo.system.entity.service without metadata persistence, repositories or target-project changes.

core-entity-service-and-sequence.purpose: Classify persistence/lifecycle-near entity, metadata and sequence classes before moving code into Springmaster Core.
architectureFindings: IDM legacy DomainEntity is an @Entity with TABLE_PER_CLASS inheritance and persistent keyValuePairs.
Springmaster DomainEntity is currently a @MappedSuperclass without persistent KeyValuePair association.
KeyValuePair and KeyValueService therefore require an explicit metadata persistence model decision.
NumberSequence is fachfrei but requires repository/runtime/schema decisions and must be a separate slice.

directExternalUsages.DomainEntity: directly extended/imported by IDM domain entities
directExternalUsages.DomainEntityService: none found outside legacy system package
directExternalUsages.TagService: none found outside legacy system package
directExternalUsages.KeyValueService: none found outside legacy system package
directExternalUsages.KeyValuePair: indirectly relevant through DomainEntity metadata association
directExternalUsages.NumberSequence: none found outside legacy system package

core-domain-entity-service-support.purpose: Implement the low-risk service support part of the entity/service/sequence slice.
